hash_injection.description: DOM XSS via location.hash -- user-controlled hash value flows into dangerous sinks without sanitization

probes.description: Hash fragment injection into innerHTML sink -- hash value not sent to server but processed client-side

postmessage_sink.description: DOM XSS via postMessage -- missing origin validation allows cross-origin message injection into dangerous sinks

probes.description: Page registers message event listener without origin check -- attacker page can postMessage with malicious payload

url_source.description: DOM XSS via URL parameters -- location, URLSearchParams, or referrer flows into dangerous sinks

probes.description: JavaScript URI in URL parameter flowing to location.href or window.open sink

jquery_sink.description: DOM XSS via jQuery selector injection -- user input passed to $() creates HTML elements

probes.description: jQuery selector with user-controlled input -- $() with location data creates executable DOM nodes

open_redirect_dom.description: DOM-based open redirect -- user-controlled value flows to location assignment without validation

probes.description: Protocol-relative redirect via DOM sink -- parameter value assigned to window.location without origin check

document_domain.description: document.domain manipulation -- relaxing same-origin policy enables cross-subdomain attacks

probes.description: Page sets document.domain -- relaxes SOP allowing any subdomain to access this page DOM
